requirement_topic.en: EU Authorised Representative, Importer Obligations & RoHS — Netherlands Entry via Rotterdam
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟授权代表、进口商义务与RoHS — 经鹿特丹进入荷兰
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟授權代表、進口商義務與RoHS — 經鹿特丹進入荷蘭

summary.en: Non-EU manufacturers of wireless/IoT devices must appoint an EU Authorised Representative (EU AR) established within the EU before the first product is placed on any EU market (including the Netherlands), pursuant to Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 Art. 4. The EU AR's name, registered trade name, or registered trademark, and contact address must appear on the product, its packaging, or accompanying documentation. The EU AR acts as the legal point of contact for RDI, customs, and other market surveillance authorities. Where an EU importer is involved (a company established in the EU importing products from outside the EU), the importer assumes obligations equivalent to an EU AR and must verify that the manufacturer has drawn up the EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), that CE marking is affixed, and that technical documentation is available. The Dutch importer or EU AR must ensure: (1) the EU DoC is drawn up in compliance with RED Annex IV and retained for 10 years; (2) CE marking (minimum 5 mm height) is affixed before Netherlands market placement; (3) Dutch-language instructions for use and safety information for consumer products (required under Dutch consumer law and Warenwet); (4) RoHS 2 (Directive 2011/65/EU) compliance — ten restricted substances with specific concentration limits in electrical and electronic equipment; (5) REACH regulation (EC No 1907/2006) compliance for chemical substances in the product. Rotterdam is Europe's largest port and the documented primary entry point for Chinese electronics into the EU; RDI and Dutch customs (Douane) conduct joint inspection programs at Rotterdam specifically targeting Chinese-origin wireless devices for CE marking compliance, customs documentation accuracy, and importer record-keeping obligations.
summary.zh: 非欧盟无线/物联网设备制造商须依据法规（EU）2019/1020第4条，在首批产品投放任何欧盟市场（包括荷兰）前，委任一名在欧盟境内设立的欧盟授权代表（EU AR）。EU AR的名称、注册商号或注册商标及联系地址须印于产品、其包装或随附文件上。EU AR充当RDI、海关及其他市场监管机构的法定联络点。若涉及欧盟进口商（即在欧盟境内设立的从欧盟境外进口产品的企业），进口商承担等同于EU AR的义务，须核验制造商已签署欧盟合格声明（DoC）、已加贴CE标志，且技术文档可供查阅。荷兰进口商或EU AR须确保：（1）EU DoC依据RED附件四签署，并保存10年；（2）CE标志（最低高度5 mm）在投放荷兰市场前加贴；（3）消费产品须附荷兰语使用说明和安全信息（依据荷兰消费品法律及《商品法》要求）；（4）RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU）合规——电气电子设备中10种受限物质须符合具体浓度限值；（5）REACH法规（EC No 1907/2006）对产品中化学物质的合规要求。鹿特丹是欧洲最大港口，也是有据可查的中国电子产品进入欧盟的主要入境点；RDI与荷兰海关（Douane）在鹿特丹开展联合检查项目，专门针对中国产无线设备的CE标志合规性、海关文件准确性及进口商记录保存义务。
summary.zht: 非歐盟無線/物聯網設備製造商須依據法規（EU）2019/1020第4條，在首批產品投放任何歐盟市場（包括荷蘭）前，委任一名在歐盟境內設立的歐盟授權代表（EU AR）。EU AR的名稱、註冊商號或註冊商標及聯繫地址須印於產品、其包裝或隨附文件上。EU AR充當RDI、海關及其他市場監管機構的法定聯絡點。若涉及歐盟進口商（即在歐盟境內設立的從歐盟境外進口產品的企業），進口商承擔等同於EU AR的義務，須核驗製造商已簽署歐盟合格聲明（DoC）、已加貼CE標誌，且技術文檔可供查閱。荷蘭進口商或EU AR須確保：（1）EU DoC依據RED附件四簽署，並保存10年；（2）CE標誌（最低高度5 mm）在投放荷蘭市場前加貼；（3）消費產品須附荷蘭語使用說明和安全信息（依據荷蘭消費品法律及《商品法》要求）；（4）RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU）合規——電氣電子設備中10種受限物質須符合具體濃度限值；（5）REACH法規（EC No 1907/2006）對產品中化學物質的合規要求。鹿特丹是歐洲最大港口，也是有據可查的中國電子產品進入歐盟的主要入境點；RDI與荷蘭海關（Douane）在鹿特丹開展聯合檢查項目，專門針對中國產無線設備的CE標誌合規性、海關文件準確性及進口商記錄保存義務。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 4 — EU Authorised Representative obligation for non-EU manufacturers
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Annex IV — EU Declaration of Conformity requirements
Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) — restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment
Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH) — registration, evaluation, authorisation and restriction of chemicals
Decision 768/2008/EC — modular CE conformity assessment framework
Warenwet (Dutch Commodities Act) — national implementation of product safety and labelling obligations in Netherlands

summary.en: In China, market access for wireless/IoT devices requires: (1) SRRC Type Approval from the National Radio Administration (NRA/MIIT) — mandatory before sale or import of any device with a radio transmitter; (2) CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C17-01 (IT equipment) or CNCA-C25-01 (certain telecom terminals) — mandatory for listed product categories; (3) China RoHS — Measures for Administration of the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (MIIT, 2016) and SJ/T 11363 series; mandatory SJ/T 11364 hazardous substance disclosure label; (4) MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for certain telecom and internet-connected devices. China has no concept equivalent to the EU Authorised Representative; the manufacturer or its appointed Chinese agent handles domestic regulatory submissions directly. SRRC, CCC, and NAL are all recognised only for the Chinese domestic market and are not accepted as substitutes for EU RED CE marking, EU DoC, or EU AR obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线/物联网设备进入市场须满足：（1）国家无线电管理局（NRA/工业和信息化部）的SRRC型号核准——所有内置无线发射器的设备在销售或进口前为强制要求；（2）依据CNCA-C17-01（信息技术设备）或CNCA-C25-01（特定电信终端）进行CCC（中国强制认证）——对列明产品类别为强制要求；（3）中国RoHS——依据《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》（工信部，2016年）及SJ/T 11363系列；须强制贴附SJ/T 11364有害物质披露标签；（4）特定电信和联网设备须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。中国没有与欧盟授权代表等效的概念；制造商或其指定的中国代理直接处理国内监管申报。SRRC、CCC和NAL均仅适用于中国国内市场，不被接受为欧盟RED CE标志、欧盟合格声明或EU AR义务的替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線/物聯網設備進入市場須滿足：（1）國家無線電管理局（NRA/工業和信息化部）的SRRC型號核准——所有內置無線發射器的設備在銷售或進口前為強制要求；（2）依據CNCA-C17-01（信息技術設備）或CNCA-C25-01（特定電信終端）進行CCC（中國強制認證）——對列明產品類別為強制要求；（3）中國RoHS——依據《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》（工信部，2016年）及SJ/T 11363系列；須強制貼附SJ/T 11364有害物質披露標籤；（4）特定電信和聯網設備須取得工信部網絡接入許可（NAL）。中國沒有與歐盟授權代表等效的概念；製造商或其指定的中國代理直接處理國內監管申報。SRRC、CCC和NAL均僅適用於中國國內市場，不被接受為歐盟RED CE標誌、歐盟合格聲明或EU AR義務的替代。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Type Approval — NRA/MIIT mandatory radio licence for wireless transmitters in China
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment; CNCA-C25-01 for telecom terminals)
China RoHS — Measures for Administration of the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (MIIT, 2016)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for restriction of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (mandatory disclosure label)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — for certain internet-connected and telecom terminal devices

gap.en: Structural gaps with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) EU Authorised Representative — Chinese manufacturers without an EU importer must appoint an EU-established AR before first EU market placement; no Chinese analogue exists; (2) EU Declaration of Conformity — must be drafted by the manufacturer; CCC certificates and SRRC approvals do not substitute; (3) RoHS 2 vs China RoHS — while both restrict similar substances, the EU annex substance list (ten substances), concentration limits, exemptions, and scope differ from Chinese requirements; EU conformity requires separate substance testing and documentation; (4) CE marking format — minimum 5 mm height, specific graphical requirements; Chinese product labels do not meet this format; (5) Dutch-language labelling — consumer products entering the Netherlands require instructions and safety warnings in Dutch (Nederlands); Chinese-market packaging is insufficient; (6) Rotterdam port risk — RDI and Douane actively inspect Chinese-origin shipments at Rotterdam; missing or incorrect EU AR identification on product or packaging triggers detention; (7) WEEE — Dutch producer registration with Wecycle or ICT Milieu required before first placement; Chinese WEEE obligations (SJ/T 11364 label) do not satisfy Dutch WEEE decree (Besluit WEEE). Allow 3–6 months for full EU RED certification plus EU AR appointment and WEEE registration.
gap.zh: 没有中国直接等效项的结构性差距：（1）欧盟授权代表——没有欧盟进口商的中国制造商须在首次欧盟市场放置前委任在欧盟境内设立的授权代表，中国没有类似要求；（2）欧盟合格声明——须由制造商起草，CCC证书和SRRC核准不可替代；（3）RoHS 2与中国RoHS——尽管两者均限制类似物质，但欧盟附件物质清单（10种物质）、浓度限值、豁免及范围与中国要求不同，欧盟合规须单独进行物质检测和文件编制；（4）CE标志格式——最低高度5 mm，有特定图形要求，中国产品标签不符合该格式；（5）荷兰语标签——进入荷兰的消费产品须提供荷兰语（Nederlands）使用说明和安全警告，中国市场包装不足；（6）鹿特丹港口风险——RDI和荷兰海关在鹿特丹主动检查中国来源货物，产品或包装上缺少或错误的EU AR标识将触发扣押；（7）WEEE——须在首次投放前向Wecycle或ICT Milieu进行荷兰生产商注册，中国WEEE义务（SJ/T 11364标签）不满足荷兰WEEE法令（Besluit WEEE）。请为完整的欧盟RED认证、EU AR委任及WEEE注册预留3至6个月时间。
gap.zht: 沒有中國直接等效項的結構性差距：（1）歐盟授權代表——沒有歐盟進口商的中國製造商須在首次歐盟市場放置前委任在歐盟境內設立的授權代表，中國沒有類似要求；（2）歐盟合格聲明——須由製造商起草，CCC證書和SRRC核准不可取代；（3）RoHS 2與中國RoHS——儘管兩者均限制類似物質，但歐盟附件物質清單（10種物質）、濃度限值、豁免及範圍與中國要求不同，歐盟合規須單獨進行物質檢測和文件編制；（4）CE標誌格式——最低高度5 mm，有特定圖形要求，中國產品標籤不符合該格式；（5）荷蘭語標籤——進入荷蘭的消費產品須提供荷蘭語（Nederlands）使用說明和安全警告，中國市場包裝不足；（6）鹿特丹港口風險——RDI和荷蘭海關在鹿特丹主動檢查中國來源貨物，產品或包裝上缺少或錯誤的EU AR標識將觸發扣押；（7）WEEE——須在首次投放前向Wecycle或ICT Milieu進行荷蘭生產商註冊，中國WEEE義務（SJ/T 11364標籤）不滿足荷蘭WEEE法令（Besluit WEEE）。請為完整的歐盟RED認證、EU AR委任及WEEE註冊預留3至6個月時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU AR required under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 Art. 4 for non-EU manufacturers without EU importer; CE marking and DoC mandatory under RED; RoHS 2 compliance mandatory for EEE; WEEE producer registration via Wecycle / ICT Milieu mandatory in Netherlands; Dutch-language labelling mandatory for consumer products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval + CCC (where applicable) + China RoHS marking required for Chinese domestic market; does not satisfy EU/Netherlands obligations

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An EU Authorised Representative is a hard legal gate for Chinese manufacturers shipping wireless devices through Rotterdam or placing products on the Dutch market without an EU importer. RDI and Douane actively check EU AR identification at Rotterdam — missing or incomplete AR details on product/packaging cause port detention. RoHS 2 compliance, Dutch-language labelling, and WEEE producer registration (Wecycle / ICT Milieu) are parallel mandatory obligations that Chinese-market documentation does not satisfy. Plan 3–6 months for full EU RED process plus AR appointment and WEEE registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 欧盟授权代表是中国制造商经由鹿特丹发货或在没有欧盟进口商的情况下向荷兰市场投放无线设备的硬性法律门槛。RDI和荷兰海关在鹿特丹主动核查EU AR标识——产品/包装上缺少或不完整的AR信息将导致港口扣押。RoHS 2合规、荷兰语标签及WEEE生产商注册（Wecycle / ICT Milieu）是并行的强制义务，中国市场文件均无法满足。请为完整的欧盟RED流程、AU AR委任及WEEE注册预留3至6个月时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 歐盟授權代表是中國製造商經由鹿特丹發貨或在沒有歐盟進口商的情況下向荷蘭市場投放無線設備的硬性法律門檻。RDI和荷蘭海關在鹿特丹主動核查EU AR標識——產品/包裝上缺少或不完整的AR信息將導致港口扣押。RoHS 2合規、荷蘭語標籤及WEEE生產商註冊（Wecycle / ICT Milieu）是並行的強制義務，中國市場文件均無法滿足。請為完整的歐盟RED流程、EU AR委任及WEEE註冊預留3至6個月時間。
